scripts.bundle: tsc && esbuild dist/web-entry.js --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --external:node:fs/promises --banner:js="/* velve web runtime — bundled by esbuild (npm run bundle). The original module boundaries are kept as `// dist/<file>.js` comments below, in dependency order: value -> scheduler -> render -> converge -> runtime -> domhost -> eval -> browser. Run `npm run bundle:min` for the minified production build. */" --outfile=web/app.js
